description.p: Mural is an open source animated wallpaper platform for Linux. Set video, scene, and web-based animated wallpapers on your desktop with session persistence, multi-monitor support, and native Linux ricing integrations including pywal, matugen, Hyprland IPC, and OpenRGB.

ul.li: Video, scene, and web wallpaper support via linux-wallpaperengine
Playlist system with shuffle, auto-rotate, and drag-and-drop
pywal, matugen, Hyprland IPC, and OpenRGB integration
Session persistence via systemd user service

description.p: Full flag coverage for linux-wallpaperengine, per-wallpaper scaling persistence, KDE Activities sync, multi-monitor profiles, VRAM pause, matugen and Hyprland IPC integration, and AUR packaging.
